title: Roasted Dense British Rye Eton Mess
description: A rich and indulgent, date-night dessert featuring roasted rye and rested meat. This British classic is perfect for those who crave a dense, comforting treat.
instructions: Roast the cubed rye in a single layer on a baking sheet for 15-20 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
In a large bowl, combine the roasted rye, beef short rib, dark brown sugar, cinnamon, allspice, and salt.
In a separate saucepan, melt the unsalted butter over medium heat. Add the heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the caramel sauce, toasted pecans, dried cranberries, and fresh thyme.
Add the egg mixture to the saucepan with the cream and stir to combine.
Pour the egg mixture over the rye mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until set.
While the Eton mess is baking, prepare the granulated sugar and vanilla extract in a small bowl.
Once the Eton mess has finished baking, remove it from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Top the Eton mess with the granulated sugar mixture and serve warm.
Garnish with fresh thyme and serve immediately.
